protocol.name: tahoe_glass_v1

interface.name: tahoe_glass_manager_v1

request.name: get_tahoe_glass_surface

description.summary: create a glass region controller for a surface

request.description: The returned object stores pending glass regions for the supplied wl_surface. Pending state is committed together with the next wl_surface commit.

interface.name: tahoe_glass_surface_v1
interface.description: Regions are double-buffered and committed with the associated wl_surface. Region coordinates are surface-local logical coordinates.

entry.name: clip
entry.summary: clip effect to the rounded region

request.name: set_region

description.summary: set or update a rounded glass region

request.description:
If a region with the same id already exists, it is replaced. Otherwise a new region is appended, up to the compositor limit.
The interaction scalar (0..1) drives compositor-side material easing so a region can intensify its glass (higher highlight, refraction, inner shadow) during hover, press, or enter animations. 0 means at rest.

description.summary: remove one pending region by id
